channel.title: Research on Donggyu Kim
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Donggyu Kim

item.title: Publications
item.description:
Papers

  1. Pseudo-orientable ribbon graphs: Matrix--Quasi-tree Theorem and log-concavity (with Changxin Ding), arXiv: 2603.05702, 2026.
  2. Graphs whose Eulerian trails have unique labels (with Rose McCarty and Caleb McFarland), arXiv: 2603.02501, 2026.
  3. Grassmann-Pluecker functions for orthogonal matroids (with Changxin Ding), arXiv: 2601.19830, 2026.
  4. Representation theory of polymatroids (with Matthew Baker, June Huh, Mario Kummer, and Oliver Lorscheid), arXiv: 2507.14718, 2025.
  5. Turan's theorem for Dowling geometries (with Rutger Campbell and Jorn van der Pol), arXiv: 2508.20843, 2025.
  6. Reconstructing hypergraph matching polynomials (with Hyunwoo Lee), arXiv: 2501.19081, 2025.
  7. The Jacobian of a regular orthogonal matroid and torsor structures on spanning quasi-trees of ribbon graphs (with Matthew Baker and Changxin Ding), Adv. Math., September 2026. DOI: 10.1016/j.aim.2026.111099, arXiv: 2501.08796, 2025.
  8. Baker-Bowler theory for Lagrangian Grassmannians, Int. Math. Res. Not. IMRN, April 2025. DOI: 10.1093/imrn/rnaf094, arXiv: 2403.02356.
  9. Orthogonal matroids over tracts (with Tong Jin), Forum Math. Sigma, August 2025. DOI: 10.1017/fms.2025.10085, arXiv: 2303.05353.
  10. Note on Hamiltonicity of basis graphs of even delta-matroids (with Sang-il Oum), J. Graph Theory, March 2025. DOI: 10.1002/jgt.23237, arXiv: 2308.05772.
  11. Twin-width of random graphs (with Jungho Ahn, Debsoumya Chakraborti, Kevin Hendrey, and Sang-il Oum), Random Structures Algorithms, June 2024. DOI: 10.1002/rsa.21247, arXiv: 2212.07880.
  12. Vertex-minors of graphs: A survey (with Sang-il Oum), Discrete Appl. Math., July 2024. DOI: 10.1016/j.dam.2024.03.011.
  13. Prime vertex-minors of a prime graph (with Sang-il Oum), European J. Combin., 118:103871, May 2024. DOI: 10.1016/j.ejc.2023.103871, arXiv: 2202.07877.
  14. Eigenvalues and parity factors in graphs with given minimum degree (with Suil O), Discrete Math., 346(4):113290, April 2023. DOI: 10.1016/j.disc.2022.113290, arXiv: 2111.12966.
  15. Bounds for the Twin-width of Graphs (with Jungho Ahn, Kevin Hendrey, and Sang-il Oum), SIAM J. Discrete Math., 36(3):2352-2366, 2022. DOI: 10.1137/21M1452834, arXiv: 2110.03957.
  16. Gamma-graphic delta-matroids and their applications (with Duksang Lee and Sang-il Oum), in the proceedings of ISAAC 2021, Article No. 70; pp. 70:1-70:13, 2021. DOI: 10.4230/LIPIcs.ISAAC.2021.70. Combinatorica, 43(5):963-983, October 2023. DOI: 10.1007/s00493-023-00043-6, arXiv: 2104.11383.

Ph.D. Dissertation

item.title: Talks
item.description:
• Unimodular representations of ribbon graphs - SiMEGG: Structure in Matroids, Embedded Graphs and Graphs, June 29-July 3, 2026, ICMS, Bayes Centre, Edinburgh, UK.
  • Theory of matroids with coefficients and its applications - Special Seminar, June 18, 2026, Sungkyunkwan University, Suwon, South Korea.
  • Grassmann-Pluecker functions for orthogonal matroids - 34th Cumberland Conference, May 16-17, 2026, Auburn University, Auburn, AL, U.S.
  • Pseudo-orientable ribbon graphs: Matrix--Quasi-tree Theorem and log-concavity - Special session on Algebraic Combinatorics at the AMS Sectional Meeting, March 28-29, 2026, Georgia Southern University in Savannah, GA, U.S.
  • Pseudo-orientable ribbon graphs: Matrix--Quasi-tree Theorem and log-concavity - Combinatorics Seminar, February 25, 2026, Auburn University, Auburn, Alabama, U.S.
  • Representation theory for polymatroids - Combinatorics Seminar at HY, January 8, 2026, Seoul, South Korea.
  • Grassmann-Pluecker functions for orthogonal matroids - Discrete Math Seminar at IBS DIMAG, December 26, 2025, Daejeon, South Korea.
  • Representation theory for polymatroids - 35th KIAS Combinatorics Workshop, December 22-24, 2025, Busan, South Korea.
  • Turan's theorem for Dowling geometries - Combinatorics Seminar, September 12, 2025, Georgia Tech, Atlanta, Georgia, U.S. Slides.
  • Group structures on spanning quasi-trees of ribbon graphs and regular orthogonal matroids - CanaDAM 2025, May 20-23, 2025, University of Ottawa, Ottawa, Canada.
  • Torsor structures on spanning quasi-trees of ribbon graphs - Discrete Analysis Seminar, February 28, Yonsei University, Seoul, South Korea.
  • Baker-Bowler theory for Lagrangian Grassmannians - Geometry of Matroids Workshop, October 21-25, IAS, Princeton, New Jersey, U.S. YouTube.
  • Two ways to generalize matroids with coefficients - 2024 Combinatorics Workshop, August 28-30, Chung Buk National University, Cheongju, South Korea.
  • Baker-Bowler theory for Lagrangian Grassmannians - 2024 Workshop on (Mostly) Matroids, August 19-23, 2024, IBS, Daejeon, South Korea.
  • Baker-Bowler theory for Lagrangian Grassmannians - SIAM Conference on Discrete Mathematics, July 08-11, 2024, Spokane, Washington, U.S.
  • Baker-Bowler theory for Lagrangian Grassmannians - 2024 KMS Spring Meeting, April 18-20, 2024, Daejeon, South Korea. Slides.
  • Baker-Bowler theory for Lagrangian Grassmannians - Joint seminar Atlanta-Groningen, April 15, 2024, Online.
  • Twin-width of random graphs - Combinatorics Seminar in Yeungnam University, March 18, 2024, Gyeongsan, Gyeongbuk, South Korea.
  • Orthogonal matroids over tracts - 30th KIAS Combinatorics Workshop, March 08-09, 2024, Seoul, South Korea. Slides.
  • Hamiltonicity of basis graphs of even delta-matroids - 2023 KMS Annual Meeting, October 26-28, 2023, Seoul, South Korea.
  • Orthogonal matroids over tracts - Discrete Math Seminar at IBS Discrete Mathematics Group, September 19, 2023, South Korea. YouTube.
  • Prime vertex-minors of prime graphs - CanaDAM 2023, June 05-08, 2023, Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada.
  • Orthogonal matroids over tracts - 2023 KMS Spring Meeting, April 27-29, 2023, Daejeon, South Korea.
  • (Poster) Orthogonal Matroids over Tracts - IBS ECOPRO and DIMAG poster day, April 2022.
  • Matroid theory arising from projective geometry - Workshop for Young Mathematicians in Korea 2022, Dec 03-04, 2022, KAIST, Daejeon, South Korea.
  • Stronger versions of Tutte's wheel theorem for vertex-/pivot-minors - Student Symposium in Combinatorics 2022, May 30-June 03, 2022, Australia.
  • (Poster) Gamma-graphic delta-matroids and their applications - 2022 KSIAM Spring Conference, May 27-29, 2022, IBS, Daejeon, South Korea.
  • A stronger version of Tutte's wheel theorem for vertex-minors - 2022 KMS Spring Meeting, April 28-29, 2022, South Korea.
  • A stronger version of Tutte's wheel theorem for vertex-minors - Discrete Math Seminar at IBS Discrete Mathematics Group, Feb 21, 2022, South Korea. YouTube.
  • Eigenvalues and parity factors in graphs - KAIST Math Graduate student Seminar, November 25, 2021, KAIST, South Korea; and 2021 China-Korea Young Scholars' Symposium on Discrete Mathematics, Statistics and Optimization, November 13-14, 2021.
  • Gamma-graphic delta-matroids and their applications - Discrete Math Seminar at IBS Discrete Mathematics Group, October 26, 2021, South Korea. YouTube; and 2021 KMS Annual Meeting, October 20-22, 2021.

item.title: Grants & Awards
item.description:
• 15th S-Oil Excellent Dissertation Award, 2025.
  • AMS-Simons Travel Grant, 2025.
  • Excellent Poster Award, title: Gamma-graphic delta-matroids and their applications, 2022 KSIAM Spring Conference.
